meaning: n.[物]标准具(其上有两面可调节的平行反射镜)
examples: Theoretical analysis and experimental research in the dispersion compensator based on F-P etalon are presented.
Two problems has been solved of inserting the intracavity etalon and of selecting the optimal blazed grating and its orders at grazing incidence.
Emphasis is put on the experimental research on its tunable range and the bandwidth narrowing with a diffraction grating and a Fabry-Perot etalon.
